languages.original_text: "I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."

languages.text: "Восхищаюсь вашей семейственностью, шерин! Если бы у меня появился пожилой родственник, что зудит над ухом и претендует на мое место, я бы не задумываясь отправила его туда, откуда он вылез".
"I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."
languages.original_text: "Восхищаюсь вашей семейственностью, шерин! Если бы у меня появился пожилой родственник, что зудит над ухом и претендует на мое место, я бы не задумываясь отправила его туда, откуда он вылез".

traits.locale_text: "I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."
"I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."
"I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."

languages.text: 「家族の義務感、シェリーン、素晴らしいですね！もし、年老いた親戚が私の居場所を奪おうとして耳元で騒ぎ立てていたら、私は迷わず彼を、彼が這い上がってきた場所に戻すでしょう」
languages.original_text: "I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."

traits.locale_text: 「家族の義務感、シェリーン、素晴らしいですね！もし、年老いた親戚が私の居場所を奪おうとして耳元で騒ぎ立てていたら、私は迷わず彼を、彼が這い上がってきた場所に戻すでしょう。」

languages.text: « J'admire votre sens du devoir familial, shereen ! Si j'avais un parent âgé qui n'arrêtait pas de me rebattre les oreilles en essayant de prendre ma place, je n'hésiterais pas à le renvoyer là d'où il vient. »
languages.original_text: "I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."

traits.locale_text: « J'admire votre sens du devoir familial, shereen ! Si j'avais un parent âgé qui n'arrêtait pas de me rebattre les oreilles en essayant de prendre ma place, je n'hésiterais pas à le renvoyer là d'où il vient. »

languages.text: "Ich bewundere Euren Sinn für die Familie, Shereen! Hätte ich einen betagten Verwandten, der mir ständig in den Ohren liegt und versucht, meinen Platz einzunehmen, würde ich ihn ohne zu zögern dorthin zurückschicken, von wo er kam."
languages.original_text: "I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bewundere Euren Sinn für die Familie, Shereen! Hätte ich einen betagten Verwandten, der mir ständig in den Ohren liegt und versucht, meinen Platz einzunehmen, würde ich ihn ohne zu zögern dorthin zurückschicken, von wo er kam."

languages.text: "Aile görevi bilincine hayran kaldım şirinim! Kulağımın dibinde vızıldayan ve yerimi almaya çalışan yaşlı bir akrabam olsaydı onu sürünerek çıktığı yere geri göndermekte tereddüt etmezdim."
languages.original_text: "I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."

traits.locale_text: "Aile görevi bilincine hayran kaldım şirinim! Kulağımın dibinde vızıldayan ve yerimi almaya çalışan yaşlı bir akrabam olsaydı onu sürünerek çıktığı yere geri göndermekte tereddüt etmezdim."

languages.text: «¡Admiro su lealtad para con su familia, shereen! Si yo tuviese a un viejo pariente comiéndome la oreja y tratando de ocupar mi lugar, no dudaría en mandarlo de vuelta al agujero del que se hubiese salido arrastrándose».
languages.original_text: "I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."

traits.locale_text: «¡Admiro su lealtad para con su familia, shereen! Si yo tuviese a un viejo pariente comiéndome la oreja y tratando de ocupar mi lugar, no dudaría en mandarlo de vuelta al agujero del que se hubiese salido arrastrándose».

languages.text: “亲爱的，我真是佩服你的家族责任感！要是有个老亲戚整天在我耳边嗡嗡叫，还想抢我的位子，我早让他哪儿来回哪儿去了。”
languages.original_text: "I admire your sense of family duty, shereen! If I had an elderly relative buzzing in my ear and trying to claim my place, I wouldn't hesitate to send him back to where he crawled out of."

traits.locale_text: “亲爱的，我真是佩服你的家族责任感！要是有个老亲戚整天在我耳边嗡嗡叫，还想抢我的位子，我早让他哪儿来回哪儿去了。”
